•1 review

This is a fantastic product built around the awesome supabase BaaS. I've spent quite some time playing around with it and it's 100% production ready – the i18n straight out of the box is my favourite feature as a European :) @jonathan\_wilke2 is killing it! 🙏

fantastic product packed with tons of features. Reading through the docs I can see the huge amount of work and love that was put into this. Not a common sight these days!
